The '''Sossen-7 sublight engine''' was a powerful model of [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] [[Engine/Legends|engine]] that was utilized in [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] personal [[J-type star skiff]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. The engines were one facet of the [[Starship/Legends|transport]] that indicated the craft's combat-readiness, and she went on to utilize Sossens in her ship until the end of the war, [[19 BBY/Legends|three years later]].<ref name="Databank" />

==Behind the scenes==
According to the official [[Databank (original)|Databank]] on [[StarWars.com]], Sossen-7s were installed in the [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] used by Amidala in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] and the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]]. This [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]] asserts that the engines exist inside this skiff during all its appearances between these sources.<ref name="Databank" />
